content_body: Dawn breaks across the distant woodlnd ridges of northern Georgia, where morning mist evvs and flows silently in the valleys like a great sea. A chorus of birds announces the new day. In Rustic Elegant Retreat we savor these reminders of a peace that passes all understanding and enriches our soul as we undertake the routhing activities of daily life. Thank you for sharing your piece of paradise with us. We  loved the views, the games, and the outstanding decor of your comfortable home! TX, TN, and VA
title: Peaceful Views and Beautiful Decor
